questionHtml: In the context of the model, state what the horizontal asymptote represents.
markschemeHtml:
the (vertical) speed that Jean-Pierre is approaching (as t increases)     (A1)    (C1)
OR
the limit of the (vertical) speed of Jean-Pierre     (A1)    (C1)


Note: Accept “maximum speed” or “terminal speed”.


[1 mark]

meta.title: In the context of the model, state what the horizontal asymptote represents.
